plot outline: ROMAN J. ISRAEL, ESQ. is a dramatic thriller set in the underbelly of the overburdened Los Angeles criminal court system. Denzel Washington stars as Roman Israel, a driven, idealistic defense attorney who, through a tumultuous series of events, finds himself in a crisis that leads to extreme action. Colin Farrell costars as the monied, cutthroat lawyer who recruits Roman to his firm.
title: Roman J. Israel, Esq.
akas: Me Roman J. Israel (Canada, French title)
Roman Israel, Esq. - Die Wahrheit und nichts als die Wahrheit (Germany)
